title: neocleome serrata
intro: Neocleome serrata, also known as the Serrate Neocleome or Serrate Cleome, is a plant species belonging to the Cleomaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Neocleome serrata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, with some parts used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
